Notes: Single UPDATE contains two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/rdata. Observe whether the server deduplicates, treats the second add as a conflict, or otherwise differs in reply/state.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR for y.campus.edu. twice in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset was created and whether duplicate-add handling affected post-state.
